title: 331 new found proteins in peanut with their sequence and the method of producing supplement including beverages of the basis of juice and powder from the peanut
abstract: 331 new found proteins in peanut with their sequence and the method of producing supplement including beverages on the basis of juice and powder from the peanut. 490 new found proteins in cashew sequence and method of producing food supplements including beverages on the basis of juice and powder from the cashew. 843 new found proteins in edamame (young soy) sequence and method of producing food supplement including beverages on the basis of juice and powder from the edamame (young soy)
claims:
Claims Claims 1. A food supplement composition arranged for human consumption comprising a plurality of ingredients, all from peanut. The invention provides a process for obtaining juice and powder from peanut, wherein the seed of peanut is grinded and centrifuged to make juice and powder. Total 837 proteins found in peanut. Among them, 296 are uncharacterized and 35 are putative uncharacterized new found KH good healthy proteins synthesized by KH good healthy cells. 2. Method of claim 1, wherein juice is mixed beverage that will contain certain number of cells 3. Method of claim 2, wherein Powder is mixed food supplement that will also contain certain number of cells 4. Method of claim 2, peanut has KH GOOD HEALTHY CELLS in which the RNA synthesizes good proteins that: 1 - Send signal to the DAMAGED, SICK, AND BAD CELLS that triggers that synthesis of good proteins that transform these cells to become GOOD healthy cells. 2- Send signal to the other currently undamaged cells to synthesis of good proteins to protect them from being DAMAGED, INFECTED and PRONE to DNA and other cellular alterations. 3-Send signal to the body to produce new cells that are healthy and forbid them from being affected by intra- and extracellular damaging signals. 5. Method of claim 2, in peanut contains proteins whose molecular weight are similar to the molecular weight of the human proteins of human albumin, immunoglobulin and APOA-1. 6. Method of claim 2, living cells are found in this dried powder and beverages 7. A food composition arranged for human consumption comprising a plurality of ingredients, all from cashew. The invention provides a process for obtaining food supplement of juice and powder from cashew, wherein the seed of cashew is grinded and centrifuged to make juice and powder. Total 682 proteins found in cashew, among them, 490 are uncharacterized new found KH good healthy proteins synthesized by KH good healthy cells. 8. Method of claim 6, wherein juice is mixed beverage that will contain certain 

 number of cells 9. Method of claim 7, wherein Powder is mixed food supplement that will also contain certain number of cells 10. Method of claim 7, cashew has KH GOOD HEALTHY CELLS in which the RNA synthesizes good proteins that: 1 - Send signal to the DAMAGED, SICK, AND BAD CELLS that triggers that synthesis of good proteins that transform these cells to become GOOD healthy cells. 2- Send signal to the other currently undamaged cells to synthesis of good proteins to protect them from being DAMAGED, INFECTED and PRONE to DNA and other cellular alterations. 3-Send signal to the body to produce new cells that are healthy and forbid them from being affected by intra- and extracellular damaging signals. 11. Method of claim 7, in cashew contains proteins whose molecular weights are similar to the molecular weight of the human proteins of human albumin, immunoglobulin and APOA-1. 12. Method of claim 7, living cells are found in this dried powder and beverages 13. A food supplement composition arranged for human consumption comprising a plurality of ingredients, all from edamame. The invention provides a process for obtaining juice and powder from edamame, wherein the seed of edamame is grinded and centrifuged to make juice and powder. Total 1,223 proteins found in edamame, among them, 679 are uncharacterized and 164 are putative uncharacterized new found KH good healthy proteins synthesized by KH good healthy cells. 14. Method of claim 13, wherein juice is mixed beverage that will contain certain number of cells 15. Method of claim 14, wherein Powder is mixed food supplement that will also contain certain number of cells 16. Method of claim 14, edamame has KH GOOD HEALTHY CELLS in which the RNA synthesizes good proteins that: 1 - Send signal to the DAMAGED, SICK, AND BAD CELLS that triggers that synthesis of good proteins that transform these cells to become GOOD healthy cells. 2- Send signal to the other currently undamaged cells to synthesis of good proteins to protect them from being DAMAGED, INFECTED and 

 PRONE to DNA and other cellular alterations. 3-Send signal to the body to produce new cells that are healthy and forbid them from being affected by intra- and extracellular damaging signals. 17. Method of claim 14, in edamame contains proteins whose molecular weight are similar to the molecular weight of the human proteins of human albumin, immunoglobulin and APOA-1. 18. Method of claim 14, living cells are found in this dried powder and beverages
